title: Foundation: config/audit gate #1
purpose: Validate `MnemoConfig.swift` rejects cloud hosts, LAN binds, and backing-store mismatch at startup with tested exit codes 3/0.

title: Foundation: config/audit gate #2
purpose: Extend `LoopbackAudit.swift` to parse `lsof` output for Rivet/smfs edge ports; document in `mnemoctl audit` help.

title: Foundation: config/audit gate #3
purpose: Ensure `StackHealth.swift` aggregates ollama+engine+smfs with actionable unhealthy reasons.

title: Foundation: config/audit gate #4
purpose: Add version stamp to `MnemoCore/Placeholder.swift` from git tag or build flag — surface in `mnemoctl health`.

purpose: Harden `TOML.swift` parser against malformed `mnemo.toml` — fail closed with line numbers.
